metadata.description: An opinionated Claude Code workflow system. Every coding session tells a story: orient, plan, build, review, reflect, archive.

plugins.name: narrative-engine-lifecycle
plugins.description: The core workflow arc: prime, plan, build, review, reflect, archive. Seven skills that guide you through a complete coding session.

plugins.name: narrative-engine-scaffolding
plugins.description: Project initialization that detects your stack and generates CLAUDE.md, context directory, and workflow scaffolding.

plugins.name: narrative-engine-analysis
plugins.description: Deep inspection tools: multi-agent code audits, tech debt scanning, and periodic research scanning.

plugins.name: narrative-engine-quality-guards
plugins.description: Auto-activating quality principles: code quality, research methodology, session management, and AI writing detection.
